Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class PlatformAction

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.PlatformAction
public class PlatformAction extends SObject

Java class for PlatformAction complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="PlatformAction">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="ActionListContext" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ActionTarget" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ActionTargetType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ApiName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Category" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ConfirmationMessage" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DeviceFormat" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ExternalId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="GroupId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IconContentType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IconHeight" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IconUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IconWidth" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="InvocationStatus" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="InvokedByUser" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="InvokedByUserId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsGroupDefault" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsMassAction" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Label" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OpenType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PrimaryColor" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RelatedListRecordId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RelatedSourceEntity" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RetrievalMode" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Section" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SourceEntity" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Subtype" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TargetObject" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TargetUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Type" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
